title: Phase J1 — Developer Experience Layer Design Compliance Matrix

design_references.roadmap_section: 🔟 FINAL DELIVERY STAGE — Developer Experience (SDK, CLI, Documentation Portal, Runtime API Docs)
design_references.related_phases: F1 UnifiedRuntimeAPI, CodeGraph v1, I3 Reliability Design, Phase FINAL Certification

compliance_items.description: All interfaces MUST be defined as typing.Protocol.
compliance_items.evidence: 4 protocols defined as @runtime_checkable class Foo(Protocol): ISDKClient, ICLIRuntime, IDocGenerator, IAPISpecPublisher. All method signatures return Dict[str, Any] for type safety.

compliance_items.description: Every method MUST return typed contracts (dataclasses).
compliance_items.evidence: 17 frozen dataclasses defined: SDKConfig, SDKConnectionResult, DAGSubmissionRequest, DAGSubmissionResult, ExecutionObservation, CLICommandSpec, CLICommandResult, CLIRoutingDecision, DocArtifact, APISpecPayload, DocGenerationRequest, SpecPublicationReceipt, DevExTraceContext. All use @dataclass(frozen=True) for immutability.

compliance_items.description: Every critical span MUST be observable. Events published to EventBus.
compliance_items.evidence: 10 event hooks defined (H1-H10) covering all SDK, CLI, Doc, and Spec operations. Topics follow runtime.devex.* naming convention. Every event carries devex_trace_id. Event schema uses existing ExecutionEvent type with STATE_TRANSITION.

compliance_items.description: Every state transition MUST be recoverable.
compliance_items.evidence: Spec rollback with previous_spec_hash preserved (IAPISpecPublisher.rollback_spec()). Doc artifact rollback via previous_content_hash. Baseline freeze pattern from Phase FINAL applies to published doc artifacts. CLI replay command delegates to F1.replay() for deterministic execution recovery.

compliance_items.description: Every operation MUST carry trace_id for full back-traceability.
compliance_items.evidence: devex_trace_id accepted as last parameter in all 16 protocol methods (4 protocols × 4 methods). Trace hierarchy defined: SDK → CLI → Doc → Spec. 6 propagation rules (P-R1 to P-R6) enforce trace coverage. DevExTraceContext dataclass for structured trace metadata.

compliance_items.description: No external component may call ExecutionEngine directly.
compliance_items.evidence: Architecture diagram shows strict one-way: DevEx → F1 → CompositionRoot → Core. CLI routing guards (G-R1) block any command targeting non-F1 for writes. SDK endpoints MUST point to F1 UnifiedRuntime. Zero direct imports from core/runtime/services/, core/execution_engine.py, or core/runtime/services/.

compliance_items.description: Same inputs MUST produce same outputs.
compliance_items.evidence: Deterministic Doc Guard (DDG) defined with SHA-256 hashing of all inputs before generation. DDG enforcement at 4 stages (extraction, spec gen, canon rendering, final artifact). content_hash = SHA-256(input_hash + template_version + sorted_definitions). All dataclasses use __post_init__ for deterministic hash computation.

compliance_items.description: All IO MUST be validated and bounded.
compliance_items.evidence: SDK connect validates endpoint + auth_token before handshake. CLI commands are read-only (CodeGraph) or F1-proxied. Doc extraction is read-only on CodeGraph snapshot. Spec loading is read-only. All IO bounded by timeout_sec in SDKConfig (default 30s).

compliance_items.description: All state transitions MUST be gated by safety guards.
compliance_items.evidence: 5 Doc Pipeline Guards (G-D1 to G-D5) gate all 5 pipeline stages. 5 CLI Routing Guards (G-R1 to G-R5) gate all CLI commands. Guard evaluation flow diagram defined with ALLOW/FLAG/BLOCK branching. CLI routing table maps 8 commands to their applicable guards. Pipeline state machine with 7 transitions and guard enforcement.

compliance_items.description: Services MUST be isolated — no cross-service impact.
compliance_items.evidence: SDK sessions are isolated per-connection (session_id). CLI commands are scoped per-trace (devex_trace_id). Doc publication is scoped per-target-repository. Spec publish is scoped per-broker. All event hooks carry source identifier for isolation debugging.

compliance_items.description: Failed operations MUST have independent retry/recovery paths.
compliance_items.evidence: SDK retry_policy supports exponential_backoff, linear, none (SDKConfig.retry_policy). IAPISpecPublisher.rollback_spec() provides spec recovery. DDG mismatch triggers re-generation (not silent failure). SpecPublicationReceipt tracks action (published/rolled_back) for audit trail.

design_artifacts.blueprint: 04_integration_blueprint.md — 3 flows, 10 events, trace strategy, acceptance criteria

stop_conditions_verified.Zero production code written in core/: PASSED (design only — no .py files in core/)
